title: BOLSIUS - Pillar Candles - 2.4 x 1.6 inches - Ivory - Tray of 4, 60/40mm
features: Bolsius's white-coloured pillar candles boast a full 6cm in height and burn for a good 7 hours. The natural light of candles brings a unique warmth
This candle's clear white colour will add a fresh touch to your interior and is a real bridging colour, which means that it combines beautifully with all other colours from the Bolsius collection
The mark of a quality candle is its long burning time and its use of the best raw materials
Every Bolsius candle is made with skilled craftsmanship and with a sharp focus on quality. The candles don't soot and there's no smoulder or smoke when you burn the candles
We love to keep on creating magical moments for you and future generations. That’s why we pioneer with either olive, rapeseed or sunflower oil from Europe
description: From the manufacturer Bolsius Pillar Candle (tray 4) Bolsius Pillar Candle White 60/40 mm (tray 4) Beautiful stable flame Burn time: 7 hours Wicks are easy to relight High quality candle Manufactured in the EU Bolsius Pillar Candle Ivory 60/40 mm (tray 4) Beautiful stable flame Burn time: 7 hours Wicks are easy to relight High quality candle Manufactured in the EU Bolsius Pillar Candle White 100/50 mm (tray 4) Beautiful stable flame Burn time: 7 hours Wicks are easy to relight High quality candle Manufactured in the EU Bolsius Pillar Candle Ivory 100/50 mm (tray 4) Beautiful stable flame Burn time: 7 hours Wicks are easy to relight High quality candle Manufactured in the EU This is who we are Our history, which began in 1870, has given our company a solid basis, we now develop and produce candles in all shapes and sizes. Thanks to a combination of knowledge, specialisation and entrepreneurship, over the years we have developed a complete range of quality candles in many shapes and sizes.

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Keep away from direct sunlight, use a sturdy candlestick or candle holder, place the wick upright before lighting it.
